name: Survey announcement | The goon Therapist

I'm ngl, this is lit my first time making an announcement lmao

Just making this we're like close to 20k lmao—which is baffling because I never expected to be this far or have this growth lmao

I don't say this often since I'm not good with words but Thank you !! In credits due, the format was taken by TravAme and Rvngv

I will be continuing some series like the Stepdad one (Mayuri, Reina, Himeko and etc) the ending will be a multi bot with 5 characters (Reina's older sister and the single milf neighbor)

The cheerleading mom series aswell (Runa, Reika, Sakura, Riko) & the Hanabira Family (Rikku and her mom) & the Sumihara Family (Misaki, Chiharu, Haruka) & the MPM (Anubis, Bastet and other Phantheons)

There's also a BULLY series (Your bully, her older sister and her mom) that's hatesex, emotionless sex and lovesex —brattaming, milf and ceo so yeah

Some short QnA

  • What do I use to make the images?

I use Tensor Ai to generate the images. The model is NTR mix and the loras are 96Yottea and 748cm. I use Pixai to upscale images: Here's my Tensor account if you wanna take a look

  • What apps do I use to edit?

I use IbisPaintX, Abdobe LightRoom, Snapseed and Canva to make designs. Admittedly, I'm not good with editing lmao

  • Who am I?

    19 yr old Filipino dude who just wanna goon. College student

  • When did I start making bots? What inspired me?

    I started at November 2, 2024 becauss I got horny and saw there were like no Stepmom teacher x {{user}} student, and yeah here we are now lmao. There were lots of inspirations for me to make bots—but TravAme, NicholasCS and Cylical were mostly what made me start making bots

    Enough yapping. Here's the forum lmao:
